metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins for common engineering workflows and use cases.

plugins.name: git-commit
plugins.description: Git commit formatting and creation skill based on a set of solid Git commit message rules by Chris Beams: https://cbea.ms/git-commit/

plugins.name: git-worktree
plugins.description: Manages git worktrees including listing, creating, removing, and switching between worktrees with consistent naming conventions

plugins.name: codebase-analyzer
plugins.description: Comprehensive multi-phase codebase technical analysis. Analyzes architecture, code quality, testing, infrastructure, and generates a detailed engineering report.

plugins.name: generate-release-notes
plugins.description: Generates release notes and changelogs from conventional commit messages parsed from git log history

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Multi-reviewer code review orchestrator. Runs a comprehensive review, security review, codex review, and codex adversarial review in parallel and combines their findings into one prioritized, timestamped report.
